holdings.infoBox: IDYN is an equity ETF with a total of 197 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 4.48%, Novartis AG at 2.90%, AstraZeneca at 2.45%, Iberdrola at 1.85%, and Banco Santander at 1.82%.

overview.description: The iShares International Equity Factor Rotation Active ETF (IDYN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to tactically invest in large- and mid-cap global ex-US stocks based on style factors believed to outperform on a forward-looking basis. The fund may invest up to 35% in emerging market equities IDYN was launched on Aug 5, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
